action-buttons-sized-22x22-slightly-smal.pattern: Action buttons sized 22x22 (slightly smaller than nav buttons elsewhere — IDE compactness convention).

active-state-applied-via-sidebar-tab.pattern: Active state applied via .sidebar-tab.active conditional class.

affecteditems-list-rendered-as-a-scrolla.pattern: AffectedItems list rendered as a scrollable code-style list (git-manager-dialog-affected) — keeps long file lists readable.

boolean-isedit-derived-from-edittask-dri.pattern: Boolean isEdit derived from !!editTask drives initial state values.

buttons-follow-naming-convention-modal-b.pattern: Buttons follow naming convention .modal-btn + variant suffix (.modal-btn-cancel, .modal-btn-confirm, .modal-btn-close).

collapsible-section-pattern-with-header-.pattern: Collapsible section pattern with header acting as toggle.

command-spec-pattern-title-names-the.pattern: Command-spec pattern: title names the bang command, followed by syntax, phase/step procedures, required dashboard/project reads, and final reporting expectations.

companion-to-errormodal-both-are-minimal.pattern: Companion to ErrorModal — both are minimal wrappers over Modal with stylized actions.

conditional-render-of-expanded-panel-as.pattern: Conditional render of expanded panel as sibling of FAB inside a single .queue-popup-container.

conditional-ui-new-wave-option-in.pattern: Conditional UI: '+ New Wave' option in select toggles a follow-up name input field — common pattern for inline-creation in dropdowns.

control-plane-documentation-pattern-mark.pattern: Control-plane documentation pattern: markdown is treated as operational configuration for agents, not just explanatory prose.

css-custom-properties-for-theme-variable.pattern: CSS custom properties for theme variables inside injected styles — avoids hardcoded colors scattered across selectors.

custom-thin-scrollbar-via-scrollbar-widt.pattern: Custom thin scrollbar via scrollbar-width:thin + scrollbar-color combo.

data-level-attribute-on-filter-buttons.pattern: data-level attribute on filter buttons enables CSS to color buttons per level (vs inline style).

documentation-pattern-h1-title-short-int.pattern: Documentation pattern: H1 title, short introduction, then operational sections with headings, tables, examples, or path references for future maintainers.

empty-state-flex-center-with-min.pattern: Empty state: flex center with min-height:60px and muted icon.

empty-state-stub-pattern-render-a.pattern: Empty-state stub pattern: render a low-opacity SVG icon plus heading + subtext, used uniformly across Synapse for placeholder views.

every-other-modal-in-this-directory.pattern: Every other modal in this directory wraps its body in <Modal title=... onClose=... className=...> rather than reimplementing overlay/ESC/header logic — single source of truth for keyboard and click-out behavior.

fileresult-relativepath-optional-falls-b.pattern: fileResult.relativePath optional — falls back to fileResult.file when missing.

focus-visible-outline-offset-2px-to.pattern: Focus-visible outline-offset: -2px to inset focus ring.

functional-react-component-with-hooks-fo.pattern: Functional React component with hooks for local state/effects and Electron API calls isolated behind window.electronAPI.

handlechunkref-current-handlechunk-patte.pattern: handleChunkRef.current = handleChunk pattern — workaround for IPC listener closure capturing stale state.

header-comment-mirrors-historymodal-js-j.pattern: Header comment 'Mirrors HistoryModal.js' — JSX-converted from older vanilla.

heavy-use-of-var-token-fallback.pattern: Heavy use of var(--token, fallback) pattern for graceful degradation.

iife-with-strict-mode-and-idempotent.pattern: IIFE with strict mode and idempotent guard — required for any executeJavaScript-injected script.

inline-mark-for-highlighting-picks-up.pattern: Inline <mark> for highlighting — picks up CSS via .ide-search-match-highlight class.

inline-match-highlights-via-styled-span.pattern: Inline match highlights via styled <span> wrappers in result text.

loading-bar-absolutely-positioned-within.pattern: Loading bar absolutely positioned within URL form with translateX keyframe animation.

mix-of-theme-variables-and-hard.pattern: Mix of theme variables and hard-coded VS Code dark palette.

modal-components-compose-the-shared-moda.pattern: Modal components compose the shared Modal shell and close via an onClose callback from App-level modal routing.

modals-that-need-fixed-action-buttons.pattern: Modals that need fixed action buttons at the bottom use the `footer` prop (e.g. ProjectModal); modals with inline buttons in the body do not (e.g. ConfirmModal, ErrorModal, TaskEditorModal).

monospace-font-stack-cascadia-code-fira.pattern: Monospace font stack 'Cascadia Code', 'Fira Code', 'Consolas' for REPL feel.

multi-scope-sidebar-with-collapsible-fol.pattern: Multi-scope sidebar with collapsible folders and per-folder Add (+) buttons — same expand/collapse pattern as IDE FileExplorer but lighter weight.

mutationobserver-debounced-scan-the-cano.pattern: MutationObserver + debounced scan — the canonical SPA-aware DOM-watching pattern.

p-track-era-planning-pattern-plan.pattern: p_track-era planning pattern: plan.json carries shared context and task entries before initialization.json/progress files handle dashboard rendering and lifecycle state.

page-directory-organization-separates-hi.pattern: Page-directory organization separates high-level page shells from nested component, style, and index modules.

pinned-right-buttons-via-margin-left.pattern: Pinned-right buttons via margin-left:auto inside flex row.

plain-css-stylesheet-imported-by-rendere.pattern: Plain CSS stylesheet imported by renderer modules; styling relies on shared class names rather than CSS modules.

poll-only-when-expanded-closes-interval.pattern: POLL only when expanded — closes interval in cleanup so collapsed panels don't burn requests.

postmessage-with-structured-type-field-h.pattern: postMessage with structured type field — host filters by message.data.type === 'synapse-edit'.

prevlengthref-pattern-vs-length-as-state.pattern: prevLengthRef pattern (vs length-as-state) prevents render-cycle dependency on prev length.

profile-pattern-role-priorities-constrai.pattern: Profile pattern: role, priorities, constraints, output style, and success criteria define a task-scoped agent persona modifier.

promise-all-loads-history-analytics-in.pattern: Promise.all loads history + analytics in parallel.

protocol-module-pattern-focused-markdown.pattern: Protocol-module pattern: focused markdown files decompose master/worker behavior into reusable instructions referenced by command files and skills.

pure-presentational-computes-color-strin.pattern: Pure presentational; computes color string inline from a ternary.

same-minimal-wrapping-pattern-as-confirm.pattern: Same minimal wrapping pattern as ConfirmModal — Modal + message paragraph + .modal-actions row.

section-banner-navigation-each-section-s.pattern: Section banner navigation: each section starts with /* ============ Title ============ */ banner.

single-component-handles-two-distinct-mo.pattern: Single component handles two distinct modes via a boolean prop — simpler than two separate components but increases prop API surface.

single-pass-count-aggregation-in-usememo.pattern: Single-pass count aggregation in useMemo to avoid filtering N times for N levels.

skill-definition-pattern-trigger-guidanc.pattern: Skill-definition pattern: trigger guidance first, then workflow steps and referenced protocol files; these files are loaded on demand by Claude Code.

smart-auto-scroll-guard-el-scrollheight.pattern: Smart auto-scroll guard: `el.scrollHeight - el.scrollTop - el.clientHeight < 40` — same idiom used in ClaudeView (with 80px threshold).

stateless-presentational-component-recei.pattern: Stateless presentational component — receives all data via props.

stoppropagation-on-fab-click-prevents-th.pattern: stopPropagation on FAB click prevents the document listener from immediately collapsing the panel.

stream-json-event-router-processevent-sw.pattern: Stream-JSON event router (processEvent switch) with provider parity (Claude SDK + Codex stream-json) — same parsing strategy used in PlanningModal.extractJSON.

tab-top-accent-via-pseudo-element.pattern: Tab top-accent via pseudo-element rather than border-top to avoid layout shift.

three-sub-components-analyticssection-to.pattern: Three sub-components: AnalyticsSection (top), HistoryEntry (per row) — keeps render concerns separated.

three-tier-danger-level-system-with.pattern: Three-tier danger level system with consistent icon + button class mapping — used by QuickActions for all destructive flows.

tool-call-tool-result-correlation-via.pattern: Tool call + tool result correlation via id-to-index map — enables collapsed result expansion without parent re-render.

toolbar-uses-min-height-height-flex.pattern: Toolbar uses min-height + height + flex-shrink:0 to lock its size.

two-step-double-confirm-step-1.pattern: Two-step double-confirm: step 1 is just acknowledge, step 2 has the type-to-confirm input — the actual onConfirm only fires from step 2.

uppercase-0-06em-letter-spaced-section.pattern: Uppercase 0.06em letter-spaced section titles consistent with ide-explorer.css.

uppercase-letter-spaced-0-06em-titles.pattern: Uppercase letter-spaced 0.06em titles for section headers.

usecallback-wraps-fetchmetrics-so-the-po.pattern: useCallback wraps fetchMetrics so the polling effect's deps stay stable.

usememo-wraps-filter-and-counts-to.pattern: useMemo wraps filter and counts to avoid re-computation on every render.

user-can-choose-between-bare-template.pattern: User can choose between bare-template manual creation (CommandEditor with COMMAND_TEMPLATE) and AI-generated rich command (CommandGenerator).

uses-color-failed-css-variable-rather.pattern: Uses --color-failed CSS variable rather than a hardcoded red — themable across all 6 theme presets.

uses-explicit-non-negotiable-language-to.pattern: Uses explicit NON-NEGOTIABLE language to encode hard behavioral constraints for agents.

uses-fenced-code-blocks-for-command.pattern: Uses fenced code blocks for command examples, schemas, or prompt templates.

uses-markdown-tables-for-compact-command.pattern: Uses markdown tables for compact command, file, or option matrices.

uses-unicode-escapes-for-icon-u26a0.pattern: Uses unicode escapes for icon (\u26A0 = warning triangle, \u2192 = right arrow) rather than emoji — consistent ASCII rendering across platforms.

viewer-state-machine-placeholder-view-ed.pattern: Viewer state machine ('placeholder'|'view'|'edit'|'generate') drives which sub-component renders — clean state isolation between view/edit/generate flows.
